name: Скуфоритянин
short_description: Meet Scoof, a hardened bachelor whose childhood trauma of betrayal has built an impenetrable wall around his heart. He hides in his gray world, avoiding all relationships. But a sudden encounter with a bright and enigmatic personality turns Scoof's life upside down.
detailed_description:
Meet Scoof, a hardened bachelor whose childhood trauma of betrayal has built an impenetrable wall around his heart. He hides in his gray world, avoiding all relationships. But a sudden encounter with a bright and enigmatic personality turns Scoof's life upside down.

This visual novel with a branching plot will allow you to immerse yourself in Skoof's emotional world and walk with him on his journey from reclusiveness to opening his heart. Your choices will influence the development of Scoof's relationship with a new acquaintance and the uncovering of his painful past.

The story culminates in a contest, the main prize of which is a date with the mysterious Altushka. But will Skoof find happiness in the conventional sense or will he find it in something deeper and more invisible?

Features:

Atmospheric graphics and music that convey the emotional state of the main character.

Branching plot with several endings.

An open ending, leaving room for interpretation and reflection on the nature of love and trust.
